_note: ObjectSchema (top-level). Seeded from docs/audits/2026-06-objectschema-property-liveness.md. Roughly half dead — a large aspirational enterprise-data-management tier with zero runtime. Framework evidence cited with paths; objectui-renderer evidence as prose.

activityMilestones.note: ADR-0052 §5b.2 — audit-writer matchMilestone() emits a templated activity row when a watched field transitions into the configured value.

strategy.note: part of the live tenancy block (sql-driver reads enabled+tenantField); verify before touching.

tenantField.note: row-level tenant scoping (org-scoping plugin path) reads tenancy.tenantField — audit called it inert; corrected.

crossTenantAccess.note: part of the live tenancy block; verify before touching.

apiEnabled.note: enforced by enforceApiAccess on the REST data surface (ADR-0049 #1889) — apiEnabled:false → 404.

apiMethods.note: enforced by enforceApiAccess — operations outside the whitelist → 405.

trackHistory.evidence: no behavior-changing reader (database-loader.trackHistory is a separate ctor option)
trackHistory.authorHint: Per-field history is live via `Field.trackHistory` (plugin-audit, ADR-0052) — set it on the fields you want tracked instead of this object flag.

searchable._authorWarnSkipped: defaults to true in the schema — the lint can't distinguish author-set-true from the default, so warning here would fire on every object with an enable block. Only default-FALSE booleans are safe to authorWarn.

files.authorHint: File attachments are modeled with a `Field.file`/`Field.image` (or the sys_attachment object), not this object flag — it enables nothing on its own.

feeds.authorHint: Comments/collaboration live on the dedicated sys_comment object (plugin-audit), not this flag — it enables no feed at runtime.

activities.authorHint: Tasks/events live on the dedicated sys_activity object (plugin-audit), not this flag — it enables no activity suite at runtime.

clone.note: cloneData() gates on schema.enable.clone (explicit false ⇒ 403 CLONE_DISABLED); exposed at POST /data/:object/:id/clone (rest-server.ts registerDataActionEndpoints).

versioning.authorHint: No record-versioning engine reads this block — setting it stores nothing and snapshots no history. Remove it (use Field.trackHistory for field-level history).

partitioning.authorHint: No table-partitioning is applied from this block. Remove it — it has no runtime effect.

softDelete.evidence: no runtime; duplicates the (also dead) enable.trash
softDelete.authorHint: There is no soft-delete/recycle-bin runtime. Deletes are hard deletes; remove this to avoid implying restore semantics that don't exist.

search.authorHint: No search-engine config is consumed. Remove it — records remain queryable via the normal data API regardless.

defaultDetailForm.authorHint: The detail form is chosen by the view layer; this field's documented fallback chain is unimplemented and ignored. Remove it.

recordName.evidence: superseded by a field of type:'autonumber' + autonumberFormat (engine.ts:757)
recordName.authorHint: Auto-naming is done by a `Field` of type 'autonumber' (with autonumberFormat). This block is not read — model the name field instead.

keyPrefix.authorHint: Record ids are not prefixed from this value (no Salesforce-style key prefix runtime). Remove it — it has no effect.
